bead.title: runs: reuse Story 6 search/chip primitives + Story 7 virtualization
bead.description: Reuse Story 6 search/sort/filter chip primitives (NOT page model). Reuse Story 7 virtualization wrapper for >1k rows; build a Runs-specific adapter on top for live worker progress updates.
bead.acceptance: 1. Runs page imports chip primitives from artifacts (extracted as shared if needed). 2. Virtualization kicks in past threshold. 3. Live worker phase updates still work through virtualized list.
